claim: tools/gate_status.py shall answer, from spec/.runtime/land-log.jsonl, whether a full T2 verification has landed at-or-after the most recent T1-gated land, exiting 0 (boundary satisfied) or 1 (boundary not satisfied, printing the unverified T1-gated targets) -- this is the mechanically checkable SLICE of R-tiered-gate-not-a-commit-gate's claim; it does not itself verify that a resolver runs it, nor detect an imminent commit, nor replace R-tiered-gate-not-a-commit-gate's human-invoked procedural discipline.
